message:
feat(upgrade): add download progress indicator (ntm-chv5.3)

Display real-time download progress during upgrade:

- progressWriter: Wraps io.Writer to track bytes downloaded
  - Shows percentage, downloaded/total bytes, speed (MB/s)
  - Updates at most every 100ms to prevent flickering
  - Handles unknown Content-Length gracefully

- TTY detection for output mode:
  - Interactive (TTY): In-place updates with carriage return
  - Non-interactive: Silent progress (no spam)

- Integration with existing downloadFile:
  - Uses asset.Size as expected total
  - Falls back to Content-Length header

Example output during download:
  Downloading... 45% 7.2 MB/16.0 MB (1.2 MB/s)

Tests added for progressWriter and formatSize function.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
